# Prompt & Response Log

Chronological log of prompts and agent responses for project development. Use this in your presentation after the project is complete.

*Generated by the prompt-response-logging skill. New entries are appended below.*

---

### 2025-03-06 – Create code-reviewer subagent for PR reviews

**Prompt:**  
/create-subagent that will be the code reviewer. The agent will review the code for best practice, bad patterns, security vulnerabilities. This should follow the development life cycle. I want to be able to give it a PR of a feature of this app and give me a detailed review of the code, rinse and repeat.

**Summary:**  
Created project-level subagent at `.cursor/agents/code-reviewer.md` that reviews PRs/features for best practices, bad patterns, and security, aligned with the development lifecycle. Defined a structured review output (Critical / Warnings / Suggestions / Security notes) and project-specific checks for frontend, LangChain backend, and MCP server. User can invoke it per PR for repeatable detailed reviews.

**Prompt:**  
/prompt-response-logging

**Summary:**  
User invoked the prompt-response-logging skill. Confirmed the skill is active and that subsequent prompts will be logged to PROMPT_LOG.md with date, prompt, and a brief summary for presentation use.

### 2025-03-06 – Retroactively log code-reviewer subagent prompt

**Prompt:**  
/prompt-response-logging log my prompt before the last one I sent about creating a sub agent for reviewing code

**Summary:**  
Added a retroactive log entry for the earlier create-subagent (code reviewer) prompt and its outcome, placed chronologically before the "Activate prompt-response-logging" entry.

---

### 2025-03-06 – Best model for code reviews and add to code-reviewer agent

**Prompt:**  
what is the best model for code reviews, find it and add it to the @.cursor/agents/code-reviewer.md agent /prompt-response-logging

**Summary:**  
Researched best LLM for code review: Claude Sonnet 4 leads (SWE-Bench Verified 72.7%, 200K context, 64K output). Added `model: claude-sonnet-4` to code-reviewer frontmatter and a "Recommended model" note in the agent body so the code-reviewer subagent uses the best-performing model when invoked.

---

### 2025-03-06 – Recommend skills and subagents for Agentic Developer Project

**Prompt:**  
what other skills or subagents do you recommend for this project? @/Users/joshuamiller/Desktop/Agentic Developer Project.pdf

**Summary:**  
Reviewed the project PDF and EXECUTION_PLAN; recommended skills/subagents mapped to evaluation criteria (Presentation & Documentation, Agentic Development, LLM & Tooling, Architecture). Created documentation-readme skill (README structure, env/keys, run order, docs philosophy for the brief) and debugger subagent (frontend/backend/MCP stack debugging). Suggested optional additions: deployment-narrative skill, API selector subagent.
